ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lung_capacities" (
  "measurement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lung capacity measurement */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "lung_capacity" REAL /* Lung capacity in liters */,
  "measurement_date" TEXT /* Date when the measurement was taken */,
  "measurement_time" TEXT /* Time when the measurement was taken */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the measurement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measurement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lung_capacities_technician_id FOREIGN KEY ("technician_id") REFERENCES technicians ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the study's focus and objectives */,
  "study_type" TEXT /* Type of study (e.g., observational, experimental) */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the principal investigator for the study */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the individual who created the study entry */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the study entry was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES principal_investigators ("principal_investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "study_participants" (
  "study_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study-participant association */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant enrolled in the study */,
  "discharge_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant was discharged from the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_study_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "smoking_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each smoking status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the smoking status (e.g., smoker, non-smoker) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the smoking status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genders" (
  "gender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gender */,
  "gender_name" TEXT /* Name of the gender (e.g., male, female) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gender classification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gender_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "height_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each height range */,
  "min_height" REAL /* Minimum height in cm */,
  "max_height" REAL /* Maximum height in cm */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the height range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "age_ranges" (
  "range_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each age range */,
  "min_age" INTEGER /* Minimum age */,
  "max_age" INTEGER /* Maximum age */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the age range */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("range_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lung_health_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study this report is associated with */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of findings from the report */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the individual who created the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., preliminary, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lung_health_reports_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lung_health_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username for user login */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for user login (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the system */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the access occurred */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., login, report generation) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lung_health_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric entry */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study this metric relates to */,
  "average_lung_capacity" REAL /* Average lung capacity calculated for the study */,
  "total_participants" INTEGER /* Total number of participants measured in the study */,
  "date_calculated" TEXT /* Date when the metric was calculated */,
  "sd_lung_capacity" REAL /* Standard deviation of lung capacity for the study */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lung_health_metrics_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "technicians" (
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each technician */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the technician */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the technician is affiliated with */,
  "certification_date" TEXT /* Date when the technician was certified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("technician_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "principal_investigators" (
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each principal investigator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the principal investigator */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the principal investigator is affiliated with */,
  "specialization" TEXT /* Specialization of the principal investigator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("principal_investigator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publications" (
  "publication_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publication */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study this publication is associated with */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the publication */,
  "journal" TEXT /* Journal where the publication was published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date when the publication was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publication_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_publications_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
